name: Around the Post
description: Come play pickleball at Around the Post in Erie, PA! There are 6 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Baldwin Park
description: Baldwin Park is a place to play pickleball in Erie, PA. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Bayview Park
description: Bayview Park is a place to play pickleball in Erie, PA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Church of the Cross
description: Come play pickleball at Church of the Cross in Fairview, PA! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.
hours: Mon: 8AM-4PM Tue: 8AM-4PM Wed: 8AM-4PM Thur: 8AM-3:30PM Fri: Closed Sunday Worship: 10:00AM Sunday School: 9:00AM Copyright © 2026 Church of the Cross.

name: Corry Community Center
description: Corry Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Corry, PA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, and water.
open_play_schedule: Inside Gymnasium, Call for Open Gym times or to schedule usage. 814-665-0871
